timeout.name: Timeout / Slow Execution
timeout.description: The prompt causes the agent to run too long or never complete.
root_causes: Task is too broad or unbounded
Missing chunking strategy for large inputs
No explicit timeout or resource limits specified
solutions: Add explicit timeout parameter (e.g., 'Complete within 30 seconds')
Break task into smaller subtasks
Add chunking instructions for large data sets
Specify maximum iterations or recursion depth

incomplete.name: Incomplete Output
incomplete.description: The agent produces partial or truncated results.
root_causes: Task scope too large for single execution
solutions: Define exact output schema with all required fields
Add validation step: 'Verify all required fields are present before returning'
Break into smaller tasks if output exceeds token limits
Include example of complete expected output

hallucination.name: Hallucinated / Incorrect Output
hallucination.description: The agent generates plausible but wrong information.
root_causes: No ground truth or reference data supplied
Agent asked to generate data it cannot verify
solutions: Provide reference data or ground truth in the prompt
Add instruction: 'Only use information explicitly provided'
Include verification step in the task
Specify that unknown values should be marked as 'UNKNOWN' rather than guessed

format_mismatch.name: Format Mismatch
format_mismatch.description: Output format does not match the expected structure.
solutions: Provide exact JSON schema for expected output
Include a concrete example of the expected output
Add instruction: 'Return ONLY the JSON object, no additional text'
Specify data types for each field explicitly

context_overflow.name: Context Overflow
context_overflow.description: Input prompt exceeds the agent's context window.
root_causes: Too much context included in prompt
Entire file contents embedded instead of relevant sections
solutions: Summarize context instead of including raw data
Extract only relevant sections from large documents
Implement chunking: process data in smaller batches
Use references to external data instead of inline content

permission_error.name: Permission / Access Error
permission_error.description: The agent lacks required permissions to complete the task.
root_causes: Required credentials not provided in prompt
Agent operating outside its authorized scope
solutions: Include necessary credentials or specify how to obtain them
Define the agent's authorization scope explicitly
Add fallback behavior for permission errors
Specify which resources the agent is authorized to access

ambiguous_task.name: Ambiguous Task Definition
ambiguous_task.description: The agent misinterprets the task due to vague instructions.
solutions: Replace vague terms with specific instructions
Add explicit success criteria
Include examples of correct and incorrect behavior
Use structured prompt format (role, context, task, constraints, output)
